languages.text: {n}Вам чудится, что черный глаз Ведки отбрасывает зеленый блик, когда она поднимает на вас горящий взгляд. Ее голос звонко разносится над полем боя.{/n} "Лорд-капитан! Я верила, что вы явитесь, что вы не оставите нас в беде".

{n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."
languages.original_text: {n}Вам чудится, что черный глаз Ведки отбрасывает зеленый блик, когда она поднимает на вас горящий взгляд. Ее голос звонко разносится над полем боя.{/n} "Лорд-капитан! Я верила, что вы явитесь, что вы не оставите нас в беде".

traits.locale_text: {n}"It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye flickers with a green light as she raises her burning gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in time of need."

{n}"It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye flickers with a green light as she raises her burning gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in time of need."

{n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."

{n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."

languages.text: {n}在你看来，薇德卡抬起她炽烈的目光望向你时，那只黑色的眼睛仿佛从内透出了光彩。她的声音在战场上清晰地传开。{/n}“舰长大人！我就知道您会来。您绝不会在我们最需要的时候抛下我们。”
languages.original_text: {n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."

traits.locale_text: {n}在你看来，薇德卡抬起她炽烈的目光望向你时，那只黑色的眼睛仿佛从内透出了光彩。她的声音在战场上清晰地传开。{/n}“舰长大人！我就知道您会来。您绝不会在我们最需要的时候抛下我们。”

languages.text: {n}Vahşi bakışlarını sana çeviren Vedka'nın karanlık gözünün içsel bir ışıkla parladığı hissine kapılıyorsun. Sesi, savaş alanında net bir şekilde çınlıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan! Geleceğinizi, ihtiyacımız olan zamanda bizi terk etmeyeceğinizi biliyordum."
languages.original_text: {n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vahşi bakışlarını sana çeviren Vedka'nın karanlık gözünün içsel bir ışıkla parladığı hissine kapılıyorsun. Sesi, savaş alanında net bir şekilde çınlıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan! Geleceğinizi, ihtiyacımız olan zamanda bizi terk etmeyeceğinizi biliyordum."

languages.text: {n}La ferveur semble illuminer l'œil sombre de Vedka lorsqu'elle lève son regard déterminé vers vous. Sa voix se fait entendre clairement sur le champ de bataille.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Je savais que vous viendriez, que vous ne nous abandonneriez pas quand nous avions besoin de vous. »
languages.original_text: {n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."

traits.locale_text: {n}La ferveur semble illuminer l'œil sombre de Vedka lorsqu'elle lève son regard déterminé vers vous. Sa voix se fait entendre clairement sur le champ de bataille.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Je savais que vous viendriez, que vous ne nous abandonneriez pas quand nous avions besoin de vous. »

languages.text: {n}Te da la sensación de que el ojo oscuro de Vedka brilla con una luz interior cuando lleva su mirada fiera contra ti. Su voz resuena con claridad en el campo de batalla.{/n} «¡Lord Capitán! Sabía que acudiría; que no nos abandonaría cuando más l{mf|e|a} necesitamos».
languages.original_text: {n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."

traits.locale_text: {n}Te da la sensación de que el ojo oscuro de Vedka brilla con una luz interior cuando lleva su mirada fiera contra ti. Su voz resuena con claridad en el campo de batalla.{/n} «¡Lord Capitán! Sabía que acudiría; que no nos abandonaría cuando más l{mf|e|a} necesitamos».

languages.text: {n}Vedkas dunkle Augen scheinen von innen heraus zu leuchten, als sie ihren grimmigen Blick auf dich richtet. Ihre Stimme hallt laut und deutlich über das Schlachtfeld.{/n} "Lord Captain! Ich wusste, Ihr würdet kommen und uns in Zeiten der Not nicht im Stich lassen."
languages.original_text: {n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedkas dunkle Augen scheinen von innen heraus zu leuchten, als sie ihren grimmigen Blick auf dich richtet. Ihre Stimme hallt laut und deutlich über das Schlachtfeld.{/n} "Lord Captain! Ich wusste, Ihr würdet kommen und uns in Zeiten der Not nicht im Stich lassen."

languages.text: {n}ヴェドカの鋭い視線があなたに向けられると、彼女の黒い瞳が内なる光を放つように輝いているように思えた。戦場を揺るがす彼女の声は、あなたに届いた。{/n}「ロード・キャプテン様！あなたが来ることを知っていたわ、困っている時に私達を置いて行かないと。」
languages.original_text: {n}It seems to you that Vedka's dark eye gleams with inner light as she raises her fierce gaze toward you. Her voice rings out clearly over the battlefield.{/n} "Lord Captain! I knew you would come, that you would not leave us in our time of need."

traits.locale_text: {n}ヴェドカの鋭い視線があなたに向けられると、彼女の黒い瞳が内なる光を放つように輝いているように思えた。戦場を揺るがす彼女の声は、あなたに届いた。{/n}「ロード・キャプテン様！あなたが来ることを知っていたわ、困っている時に私達を置いて行かないと。」
